title: Pvt Ltd Registration in Andhra Pradesh | Virtual Auditor
description: Pvt Ltd Registration in Andhra Pradesh. From ₹8,999. FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV. Private limited company registration under Companies Act 201. Contact +91 9962
bodyText:
What is private limited company registration? Private limited company registration under Companies Act 2013. SPICe+ filing, DSC, DIN, MOA/AOA, PAN/TAN.
Private Limited Company Registration is a professional service offered by Virtual Auditor, an AI-powered CA and IBBI Registered Valuer firm (IBBI/RV/03/2019/12333) led by CA V. Viswanathan (FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV), serving clients in Andhra Pradesh, Andhra Pradesh since 2012.
Quick Answer: Pvt Ltd Registration in Andhra Pradesh — Private limited company registration under Companies Act 2013. SPICe+ filing, DSC, DIN, MOA/AOA, PAN. From ₹8,999. Contact +91 99622 60333.

HEADING2: Private Limited Company Registration in Andhra Pradesh
Virtual Auditor provides private limited company registration across Andhra Pradesh. With offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai, we serve businesses throughout Andhra Pradesh with the same quality of FCA + ACS + CFE + IBBI RV-led professional services.
The ROC Hyderabad handles company registrations and filings for Andhra Pradesh. Stamp duty: 5% on authorised capital. Professional tax: ₹2,500/year.

HEADING2: Our Service Scope
• SPICe+ Form Filing (INC-32)
• DSC & DIN for Directors
• Name Reservation (RUN/SPICe+ Part A)
• MOA & AOA Drafting
• PAN/TAN Allotment
• Post-Incorporation Compliance Setup

HEADING2: Step-by-Step Process
• 1
HEADING3: Step 1: Obtain DSC
Digital Signature Certificate for all directors
• 2
HEADING3: Step 2: Reserve Company Name
Via SPICe+ Part A or RUN form
• 3
HEADING3: Step 3: File SPICe+ Part B
Integrated incorporation form INC-32
• 4
HEADING3: Step 4: Receive Certificate
Certificate of Incorporation from ROC
• 5
HEADING3: Step 5: Post-Registration
Auditor appointment, INC-20A, bank account

HEADING2: Why Virtual Auditor for Andhra Pradesh
Our founder CA V. Viswanathan holds four credentials — FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV — which means your pvt ltd registration is handled by the same qualified professional, not a rotating cast of junior associates.
Technology that accelerates: Automated compliance calendars, AI-assisted document analysis, and 10,000 Monte Carlo simulations for valuations.

HEADING2: Frequently Asked Questions

faqs.q: How much does Pvt Ltd registration cost?
faqs.a: All-inclusive from ₹8,999 covering government fees, DSC, DIN, SPICe+ filing, MOA/AOA, PAN/TAN. No hidden charges. 5-15 working days.

faqs.q: What documents are needed for company registration?
faqs.a: PAN & Aadhaar of directors, address proof, passport-size photos, registered office address proof (utility bill + NOC/rent agreement), and proposed company name.

faqs.q: How long does company registration take?
faqs.a: 5-15 working days from document submission. Same-day DSC issuance, 2-3 days for name approval, 3-7 days for incorporation certificate.

faqs.q: Do you provide pvt ltd registration services in Andhra Pradesh?
faqs.a: Yes. Virtual Auditor serves clients across Andhra Pradesh from our offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai. We handle the complete process remotely with in-person meetings available at our nearest office. Contact +91 99622 60333.

faqs.q: What is the ROC jurisdiction for Andhra Pradesh?
faqs.a: Companies registered in Andhra Pradesh fall under ROC Hyderabad. Virtual Auditor handles all ROC filings for Andhra Pradesh-registered companies.

faqs.q: What is the stamp duty for company registration in Andhra Pradesh?
faqs.a: Stamp duty in Andhra Pradesh: 5% on authorised capital. Professional tax: ₹2,500/year. Contact us for exact computation based on your authorised capital.
